title: The 24-Hour Rule That Stops Bad Spending

segments.text: Every purchase you regret broke one simple rule.
The rule costs nothing and takes one day.
Wait twenty-four hours before buying anything you didn't plan for.
Most wants quietly disappear once the urge cools down.
That one day is the rule your regrets always broke.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: A single day of patience kills most impulse buys. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. 💸
